videos.title: HTML Images Tutorial
videos.description: Comprehensive tutorial on HTML images including img element, attributes, and best practices.

videos.title: Responsive Images with srcset and sizes
videos.description: Kyle explains how to use srcset and sizes for responsive images with clear examples.

videos.title: The Picture Element Explained
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains the picture element for art direction and format fallbacks.

videos.title: HTML Images Crash Course
videos.description: Brad covers image formats, img attributes, figure/figcaption, and image optimization.

videos.title: WebP and AVIF Image Formats
videos.description: Learn about modern image formats WebP and AVIF and how to use them with HTML fallbacks.

videos.title: Image Optimization for the Web
videos.description: Best practices for optimizing images including compression, formats, and lazy loading.
